properties.SQL Query:
UPDATE DIM_SELLER
SET DATE_TO = SYSDATE, IS_CURRENT = 0
WHERE SELLER_SK = '${SellerSK_Prev}'
SELECT * FROM DIM_SELLER WHERE DATE_TO is null and SELLER_ID = '${SellerID}'

INSERT INTO DIM_SELLER (
    SELLER_ID,
    ZIP_CODE_PREFIX,
    CITY,
    STATE,
    DATE_FROM,
    DATE_TO,
    IS_CURRENT
) VALUES (
    '${SellerID}',
    '${SellerZipCodePrefix}',
    '${SellerCity:replace("'", "''")}',
    '${SellerState}',
    SYSDATE,
    NULL,
    1
)
